items.title: SD-037 broadcast override 4-arm: bistable (Bug 1 fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled (breath_period=0). Bug 2 does not apply (bistable path).

items.title: SD-029/MECH-256 single-pass comparator residual (replaces 535a two-pass)
items.notes: Replaces the EXQ-535a two-pass cf_gap with the SD-029/MECH-256 spec single-pass residual ||z_obs - E2(z_prev, a_actual)||. ARM_0 baseline dropped (no ext events). ARM_1 intact + ARM_2 action-scrambled falsification. P2 graduation raised to 0.85 with interventional training (SD-013) enabled. C1 forward_r2 threshold relaxed to 0.85 to accommodate reef_food_ext-induced noise on R^2. Priority raised 5 -> 10 on 2026-05-08T04:55Z: this is the load-bearing SD-029/MECH-256 comparator behavioural test gating roughly 10 V_s/anchor-cluster claims; queue this next.
